query: 从新review下测试脚本， 没有问题的话，就要分析为什么没有明显回落，分析原因，找到解决方案；然后解决掉；

transcript.content: 现在openclaw的实现来看，是否从实现思路上 已经达到了 控制整个propmt？
结论：**从实现思路上，OpenClaw 已经达到了“控制 prompt 主干”的位置；但还没达到“控制宿主最终整个 prompt 的全部组成”。** 更准确地说，OpenClaw 现在控制的是这三块：
那openclaw 长对话 context 最大的部分 是不是已经被接管了呢？
结论：**大概率是，OpenClaw 长对话里最大的那块动态 context，已经被接管了。** 原因很直接：
ok，当前的问题汇总下，写入到开发日志中； 完成后我们开始对openclaw进行测试；

当前问题汇总已经写入开发日志：[2026-04-19-clarify-host-level-context-minor-gc-acceptance-and-openclaw-feasibility.md](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/docs/devlog/2026-04-19-clarify-host-level-context-minor-gc-acceptance-and…
你刚才验证后，openclaw 是否达到了我们认为的用户端明显可用么/？ 整体的context 大小有明显的下降么？ （切不同话题）
还不能这么说。按我们刚才真正验证到的东西，答案是： - `OpenClaw 还不能判定为“用户端已经明显可用”` - `也没有证据证明整体 context 在切不同话题后有明显下降`

我们现在的任务是 深入的测试openclaw的 gc，是否能够达标；，尽量更长的对话（可以做临时数据写入，但是不要对我其他文档做写入操作）；做好探针，记录好相关数据；预期是：更长的对话，如果正常情况下，可能要做compact了，但是因为又了gc，实际不需要compact；同时在一个同一话题的长对话后切换话题，应该有明显的context回落；这里的context指的是实际发给llm的数据； 接下来你来策划这个测试，把相关配置都做好，然后就开始测试吧，最终简明扼要的给我结果和分析；

结论先说：**OpenClaw 现在已经能实打实地压住发给 LLM 的 prompt，但还没有达到“用户明显感觉切题后 context 明显回落、基本不用再考虑 compact”的标准。** 这轮我补了专门的长会话探针： - 脚本：[eval-openclaw-guarded-session-probe.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/scripts/eval-openc…
从新review下测试脚本， 没有问题的话，就要分析为什么没有明显回落，分析原因，找到解决方案；然后解决掉；

我先 review 了测试脚本和 guarded 主路径，结论是脚本口径基本没问题，问题主要在实现本身。 核心原因有两个： - [src/dialogue-working-set-runtime-shadow.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/src/dialogue-working-set-runtime-shadow.js) 里 `maxTurns=12`…

decision.archive_summary: Earlier architecture discussion concluded OpenClaw controls the main dynamic prompt working set but not the host's entire final prompt, and likely has taken over the largest long-context portion. A dev-log summary was written, then focus shifted to validation: there was not yet evidence of user-visible usability or obvious context drop after topic switches. The user set the active test goal: deeply test OpenClaw GC on long conversations, allow temporary data writes but do not write to other docs, add probes and record data, and validate two expectations: long same-topic chats should avoid needing compact, and switching topics after a long same-topic chat should show a clear drop in actual LLM-sent context. Assistant reported the current state: OpenClaw can suppress prompt growth to some extent but does not yet meet the standard of obvious post-switch context drop or compact avoidance, and added a guarded-session probe script. Latest exchange continues that task: re-review the test script, then analyze why rollback is not obvious, find a solution, and fix it; assistant said the script was basically sound and the issue is mainly in the implementation.
decision.reasoning_summary: This is the same active task, so relation=continue. Keep the recent raw testing thread because the latest request depends on the current diagnosis and expectations. Evict the older conceptual feasibility and logging setup turns; they are resolved background. Preserve the testing constraints and acceptance criteria as pins so they survive even if some raw turns later leave the prompt.
